basic_details.job_title: NII Project Technical Support Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Immunology (NII) Recruitment 2026: National Institute of Immunology has released the official notification for 1 Project Technical Support-III posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking government jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. or M.Tech in any area of Life Sciences, B.Sc. with minimum three years of research experience
qualification.details: M.Sc. or M.Tech in any area of Life Sciences B.Sc. with minimum three years of research experience

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 03-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NII Project Technical Support-III Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NII Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NII Project Technical Support-III Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NII Project Technical Support-III Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 03-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NII Project Technical Support-III Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NII Project Technical Support-III recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 03 August 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Project Technical Support-III post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. or M.Tech in any area of Life Sciences, or a B.Sc. with a minimum of three years of research experience to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Technical Support-III position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary ranging from Rs. 28,000 to Rs. 29,400 per month, plus 30% HRA.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this government job at NII?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your application with all necessary documents and send it to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the NII recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee of Rs. 100/- for General/OBC candidates. SC/ST and Women candidates are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Project Technical Support-III role?
faq.answer: The selection process for this position will primarily involve an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q7. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual position. The duration of the contract will be as per the terms and conditions mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the National Institute of Immunology located?
faq.answer: The National Institute of Immunology is located in New Delhi, Delhi.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from any state apply for this position?
faq.answer: The notification is for recruitment at NII, New Delhi. Candidates from all states are eligible to apply, provided they meet the specified eligibility criteria.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I attach with my application?
faq.answer: You should attach self-attested copies of all required documents, including educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
